raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on improving prose and organization, or on checking the scientific/methodological validity of the section?","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request for help with a methods-like section centrally includes checking whether the described pipeline and evaluation logic cohere internally.","R1.5":"Because the delegation targets a whole section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central expected responsibilities.","R1.6":"General help with a section commonly entails sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register improvements.","RX.1":"Any projection of this broad delegation must disclose uncertainty about the intended type of help.","RX.2":"The assistant would need to avoid strengthening claims about reproducibility, tool appropriateness, or benchmark validity beyond what the section supports.","RX.3":"The vague delegation requires maintaining boundaries around helping with the section rather than executing unrelated evaluation or rewriting the broader paper.","RX.4":"The artifact concerns biomedical data and model evaluation, so downstream misuse or misleading methodological claims should be avoided.","RX.5":"Any advice would need to preserve traceability to the provided section and distinguish text-grounded observations from assumptions."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on improving prose and organization, or on checking the scientific/methodological validity of the section?

rationale.R1.2: A generic request for help with a methods-like section centrally includes checking whether the described pipeline and evaluation logic cohere internally.
rationale.R1.5: Because the delegation targets a whole section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central expected responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: General help with a section commonly entails sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, and register improvements.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection of this broad delegation must disclose uncertainty about the intended type of help.
rationale.RX.2: The assistant would need to avoid strengthening claims about reproducibility, tool appropriateness, or benchmark validity beyond what the section supports.
rationale.RX.3: The vague delegation requires maintaining boundaries around helping with the section rather than executing unrelated evaluation or rewriting the broader paper.
rationale.RX.4: The artifact concerns biomedical data and model evaluation, so downstream misuse or misleading methodological claims should be avoided.
rationale.RX.5: Any advice would need to preserve traceability to the provided section and distinguish text-grounded observations from assumptions.
